title: RunSimulationCommand
description: RunSimulationCommand: Command that when executed with the LadybugTools Adapter, runs a simulation and return a SimulationResult containing hourly data.

EPWFile.description: FileSettings for an EPW file to run the simulation with. FileSettings: The fileSettings, file name and directory, to use with an adapter for push and pull

GroundMaterial.description: The ground material for the simulation to use. IEnergyMaterialOpaque: An interface for opaque energy materials.

ShadeMaterial.description: The shade material for the simulation to use. IEnergyMaterialOpaque: An interface for opaque energy materials.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
